output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts uses RefreshQueue keyed per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant coalesce, while refreshes for different tenants can continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A single global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing_retry_session: billing queues use a global mutex only because the billing provider serializes all tenants","markdown_parser_session: markdown parser cache issues affected onboarding docs and quickstart text"]}
